## Component: DRAWING TITLE BLOCK (CP-STR-02)

Engineering-register block: labeled rows (project, document, revision, date) in a framed grid, bottom-right of technical pages.

### Geometry (px, follow literally)

```json
{
  "row_height": 30,
  "pad": 10,
  "label_size": 8,
  "label_dy": 11,
  "value_size": 11,
  "value_dy": 24
}
```

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| block_bg | panel -> background |
| frame | ink |
| rule | hairline |
| label | body |
| value | ink |

### Rules
- labels caps 8px, values below; the frame is ink, rows hairline
- revision rows name the revision letter AND its status
- bottom-right placement on technical pages

### QA
- [ ] frame + hairline rows
- [ ] revision named
- [ ] labels caps
